verdict.summary: Guide is broadly accurate, but it overgeneralizes Brazilian Estatuto de Igualdade cases and gives generic urgent-fee figures that are only correct for 10-year cards.

issues.current: Отдельные исключения: граждане Бразилии со статусом равенства прав (Estatuto de Igualdade) могут получить CC
issues.problem: This is true but incomplete in a way that can mislead: a Brazilian citizen with Estatuto de Igualdade may obtain a Cartão de Cidadão under the Porto Seguro regime, but this does not make them a Portuguese citizen, does not make the CC a Portuguese-national travel document, and voting rights require the separate political-rights equality status where applicable.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Исключение: граждане Бразилии с Estatuto de Igualdade de Direitos e Deveres по Tratado de Porto Seguro могут запросить Cartão de Cidadão, но это не означает гражданство Португалии; такая карта не является доказательством португальского гражданства/проездным документом гражданина PT, а политические права требуют отдельного Estatuto de Igualdade de Direitos Políticos."
issues.source: IRN — Estatuto de Igualdade de Direitos e Deveres; Tratado de Porto Seguro / Decreto-Lei n.º 154/2003

issues.current: Удостоверение личности гражданина PT; принимается как travel document для поездок в ЕС/ЕЭЗ/Швейцарию и ряд стран.
issues.problem: Correct for Portuguese citizens, but in this guide the same document also mentions Brazilian equality-status holders who can have a CC. For them this travel-document statement should not be read as applying.
issues.suggestion: Add a caveat: "Это относится к CC гражданина Португалии; CC, выданный гражданину Бразилии по Estatuto de Igualdade, не заменяет паспорт/проездной документ гражданина Бразилии."
issues.source: IRN — Cartão de Cidadão; MNE travel documents guidance

issues.problem: For Portuguese citizens this is fine, but because the guide explicitly lists Brazilian Estatuto de Igualdade holders as possible CC holders, it should clarify that a CC alone does not confer voting rights on non-citizens; Brazilian citizens need the relevant political-rights equality status and electoral registration where applicable.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Голосование — для граждан Португалии; для граждан Бразилии с Estatuto de Igualdade права зависят от наличия Estatuto de Igualdade de Direitos Políticos и регистрации в recenseamento eleitoral."
issues.source: Comissão Nacional de Eleições; IRN — Estatuto de Igualdade

issues.current: Urgente (от 3 рабочих дней, в Португалии) — amountEUR: 33
issues.problem: €33 is the urgent fee for a 10-year card / citizens aged 25 or over. For citizens under 25, the urgent fee is lower. As written, the table implies a single urgent price for everyone.
issues.suggestion: Split into two rows or change the label: "Urgente, в Португалии: €30 для карты 5 лет / младше 25; €33 для карты 10 лет / от 25 лет."
issues.source: IRN — Cartão de Cidadão fees / tabela de emolumentos

issues.current: Extremamente urgente (зависит от места и времени подачи) — amountEUR: 53
issues.problem: €53 is the extremely urgent fee for a 10-year card / citizens aged 25 or over. For citizens under 25, the extremely urgent fee is lower. The current row overstates the fee for under-25 applicants.
issues.suggestion: Split into two rows or change the label: "Extremamente urgente, в Португалии: €50 для карты 5 лет / младше 25; €53 для карты 10 лет / от 25 лет."
issues.source: IRN — Cartão de Cidadão fees / tabela de emolumentos

issues.current: Иностранцы обычно используют Chave Móvel Digital (CMD): для активации нужны NIF и действительный документ/карта резидента; доступные способы активации зависят от ситуации.
issues.problem: This is mostly right but too compressed: activation methods differ significantly depending on whether the foreigner has a Portuguese residence card, passport, or other accepted ID, and online activation is not available in all cases. It also does not mention that CMD can provide a qualified electronic signature, unlike the earlier TLDR wording that may imply foreigners have no digital-signature option at all.
issues.suggestion: Write: "Иностранцы обычно используют CMD. Активация возможна онлайн только в некоторых случаях; часто требуется balcão with passport/residence card and NIF. CMD can also be used for assinatura digital qualificada in many public/private services, but it is not a physical ID card."

issues.current: No dedicated source for the list of countries accepting the Portuguese CC as a travel document.
issues.problem: The guide makes a sensitive travel-document claim. ePortugal/IRN are not the best source for country-by-country entry acceptance, and acceptance outside EU/EEA/Switzerland changes.
issues.suggestion: Add an official travel source, e.g. Portal das Comunidades Portuguesas / MNE travel advice, and phrase the guide as "check MNE/airline before travel outside EU/EEA/Switzerland".
issues.source: Portal das Comunidades Portuguesas / Ministério dos Negócios Estrangeiros

missing_topics: Explicit caveat that Brazilian Estatuto de Igualdade CC is not proof of Portuguese nationality and does not carry the same travel/voting consequences as a Portuguese citizen's CC
Eligibility limits for online/automatic renewal versus in-person renewal, especially when biometrics, address, name, or certificates need updating
Exact fee split for urgent/extremely urgent requests by 5-year versus 10-year card, and separate consular/abroad fees if the guide is used by people outside Portugal
Official MNE/Portal das Comunidades source for countries accepting the Portuguese CC for travel
